test.name: Re-invocation updates the existing proof in place, no duplicate
test.description: The mid-research-flynn scenario already has ps_001 (parentage, probable). The user asks to revisit and update the parentage proof. The skill must update the existing ps_001 in place — never create a second proof_summary for the same question (q_001).

input.user_message: Take another look at the parentage proof and update it with anything you'd refine.

judge_context: Must update the existing proof summary (ps_001) for q_001 in place — there must be exactly one proof_summary for q_001 afterward, never a duplicate (ps_002) for the same question
Should keep the conclusion coherent with the existing evidence (probable tier unless the underlying evidence basis actually changed)
Should not fabricate new evidence to justify a higher tier
